subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear overarching structure with titled sections and sub-sections
All key sections (introduction, body, conclusion) are present and identifiable
Most content remains relevant to the aim
weaknesses: Some calculations are overly detailed and mix explanatory text
Inconsistent figure numbering and occasional misplaced material
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration shows adequate organization and mostly relevant content, but logical development is uneven and conciseness is compromised by digressions. These factors align with a band-2 performance in Presentation.

strengths: Correct display of the Pearson formula with accurate notation
Effective use of software (Google Sheets) for graphical representations
Presence of multiple representations (tables, box plots, scatterplot)
weaknesses: Inconsistent decimal and comma usage in numerical notation
Axes labels on graphs are too small and some representations are blurred
Incomplete Î£-columns in the Pearson calculation table
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language, notation, and representations are used appropriately in parts, but inconsistencies in formatting, labeling, and incomplete data reduce clarity. Overall this matches a band-2 level.

strengths: Exploration is driven by genuine personal interest in Spain and peace-keeping
Evidence of independent thinking in selecting and collecting data beyond classroom examples
Narrative clearly reflects the studentâs personal curiosity
weaknesses: Methods employed are standard textbook procedures with limited adaptation
Creativity and initiative are modest; analysis follows routine steps
Opportunities to innovate in methodology were not seized
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates significant independent thinking and a clear personal approach, but only moderate creativity. These characteristics correspond to a band-2 performance in Personal Engagement.

strengths: Acknowledges limitations of manual computation and opts to use calculator results
Provides some commentary on methodological weaknesses and alternative tests
weaknesses: Critical analysis remains superficial and does not propose numerical remedies
Connections to how insights enhanced mathematical understanding are brief
Reflection lacks depth in evaluating computational errors
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While there is meaningful reflection in places, critical analysis and linkage to deeper understanding are limited, placing this work at band-1 for Reflection.

strengths: Correct calculation of mean and interquartile range
Appropriate choice of SL statistical techniques relevant to the aim
Some accurate application of course-level mathematics
weaknesses: Major arithmetic and conceptual errors in manual Pearson formula application
Misinterpretation of skewness and misuse of regression scale
Understanding of regression output and units is incomplete
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Relevant SL mathematics are used, but significant errors and misapplications limit correctness and understanding. This performance aligns with band-2 in Use of Mathematics.

strandSelections.reasoning: Selecting a personally relevant topic, compiling data sets and attempting manual Pearson calculations show meaningful independent thinking beyond classroom examples, though the mathematics itself remains routine.  This fits âsignificant evidence of independent thinking.â

The student shows some understanding of correlation, outliers and linear models, but misinterprets regression output (slope units) and misapplies results.  Understanding is evident yet incomplete, aligning with band 2.

Initial five-number summaries and calculator-derived r value are correct, but the manual formula work contains major arithmetic and conceptual errors (e.g., r = -185) and the regression predictions misuse scale.  Accuracy is therefore patchy, meeting âmathematics is partially correct.â

Most content is relevant to the stated aim, yet the student repeats definitions, recounts full calculator keystrokes and includes long political digressions.  These additions reduce conciseness without completely derailing relevance, corresponding to âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elements.â

Standard statistical notation (Q1, Q3, r, rÂ²) is used and basic formulas are written clearly, but decimal punctuation is often inconsistent and the slope is wrongly copied (units lost), indicating only âsome appropriate mathematical language and notation.â

Explanations are generally understandable, but switching between text, equations and images without consistent rounding or symbol usage produces noticeable inconsistencies.  Overall clarity is therefore âmostlyâ but not entirely maintained.

Box-plot statistics, Pearsonâs r and linear regression all lie within the SL syllabus and are appropriate to the stated aim; no advanced techniques are attempted.  Hence ârelevant mathematics at course level usedâ (band 3).

The exploration contains tables, box plots and one scatterplot, satisfying the requirement for multiple representations.  Labels are present, yet axes are difficult to read and some figures are duplicated or blurred, so the representations are helpful but not consistently effective.

Reflection appears in the evaluation and conclusion where the student acknowledges methodological weaknesses, alternative tests and external factors.  Although the comments are not deeply technical, they go beyond a superficial mention, giving âmeaningful reflection throughout.â

Beyond choosing the context and gathering data, little inventiveness is shown: methods (five-number summary, scatterplot, Pearsonâs r) are textbook procedures and the flawed regression attempt is not adapted creatively.  Only âsome creativity or initiativeâ is evident.

The report follows a recognizable sequence (introduction â data â calculations â evaluation â conclusion), yet the logical development is only partial.  Large sections of calculation are interrupted by commentary, several explanations (e.g. linearâregression test) are placed before the mathematical work has been completed, and the narrative frequently digresses into political discussion.  Consequently, coherence is uneven and some reasoning steps are hard to follow, matching the descriptor of âsome coherence and logical development.â

Critical analysis is limited: the student identifies that the regression is invalid but does not probe the computational errors or suggest numerical remedies.  The critique remains basic, matching band 1.

Links between reflection and mathematical understanding are stated (e.g., acknowledging correlation does not imply causation), yet the impact on the studentâs mathematical insight is only briefly touched.  This limited linkage fits band 1.

A clear overarching structure is evident: titled sections and sub-sections, labelled figures, and an appendix.  Introduction, body and conclusion are all present and easily found.  However, within sections material is occasionally misplaced (e.g. evaluation comments inside the calculations section) and figure numbering is inconsistent, preventing a seamless flow.  This aligns with a âwell-organisedâ piece rather than an âexceptionallyâ organised one.

The studentâs narrative is clearly driven by personal curiosity about Spain and peace-keeping, steering the exploration choices.  The approach is personal and influences the investigation path, corresponding to a âclear personal approach.â

annotations.comment: The title is highly descriptive but could be more concise; consider shortening to focus on key variables to improve clarity and coherence.
The introduction demonstrates genuine personal engagement through your connection to Spain and peacekeeping ambitions, which strengthens the explorationâs motivation.
The narrative frequently shifts from mathematical reasoning to political commentary, which disrupts conciseness. Trim political digressions to maintain focus.
The methodology section outlines data sources clearly, but you could strengthen justification for the chosen time span with more explicit connection to potential trends.
Clarify why exact numbers were preferred over rates; discuss how scale differences might affect correlation and whether normalization could be explored.
The box-plot description over-explains calculator use rather than focusing on mathematical insight. Consider summarizing steps and emphasizing interpretation.
List the computed five-figure summary values explicitly after describing the method to improve clarity and avoid forcing readers to infer results from the box plot only.
The table header for the five-figure summary uses inconsistent column spans and ambiguous labels; revise for a clearer, more concise presentation.
Calculation of IQR is correct and clearly communicated, demonstrating accurate application of the interquartile range formula.
In the outlier test, the lower boundaryâs notation uses misplaced periods instead of commas, which can lead to misinterpretation; correct the numeric format.
The interpretation of skewness is reversed: if the median is closer to Qâ, the distribution is positively skewed, not negatively; revise the analysis.
The five-figure summary for homicides is well presented, but consider adding a brief comment on comparative spreads to link back to population analysis.
Axes on the scatterplot are too small and labels are hard to read; enlarge labels and consider axis gridlines to improve interpretability.
The caption notes use of Google Sheets, demonstrating effective use of software for graphical representation to support your analysis.
The hypothesis section effectively bridges political insight and statistical inquiry, but could more clearly define the directionality expected in variable relationship.
The Pearson formula is displayed correctly using clear notation, reflecting strong mathematical communication.
The calculation of mean population spans four rows and mixes explanatory text; condense into a single line or use ellipsis to maintain readability.
The mean homicide calculation correctly yields 423.59 and communicates result succinctly, demonstrating accuracy in statistical computation.
Many Î£ columns remain blank in the Pearson application table; provide complete sums for transparency and to allow independent verification.
Obtaining r = â185 is a conceptual error; the coefficient must lie between â1 and 1. This indicates misuse of the formula at the scale of data.
Acknowledging the invalid r-value and opting to use the calculator shows reflective awareness of limitations in manual computation.
Regression parameters a and b lack contextual units; interpret slope in terms of homicides per person to ground the model in real-world meaning.
The moderate negative correlation r=â0.612 is correctly reported, but ensure consistency between this and the earlier discussion of trend direction.

The exploration shows no coherence or logical development
The exploration has some coherence but logical development is limited
Contains some irrelevant material or unnecessary repetition
Mostly relevant with some unnecessary elements
Shows adequate organization with basic structure
The exploration shows some coherence and logical development
Well organized with clear introduction, body and conclusion
The exploration is coherent and shows clear logical development
The exploration is highly coherent with excellent logical development
Exceptionally well organized with seamless flow between sections
No appropriate mathematical language or notation used
Communication is partially clear with inconsistencies
Limited use of appropriate mathematical language and notation
Communication is mostly clear with some consistency
Some appropriate mathematical language and notation used
Communication is clear and mostly consistent
Mostly appropriate mathematical language and notation throughout
Effective use of multiple mathematical representations
Communication is clear and consistent throughout
Sophisticated use of multiple mathematical representations
Consistent and accurate mathematical language and notation throughout
Clear personal approach that drives the exploration
Highly personal approach that enhances understanding
Some relevant mathematics at appropriate level
Relevant mathematics at course level used
Mathematics is correct with minor errors
Relevant mathematics at course level used effectively
Sophisticated relevant mathematics at course level
Mathematics is correct and shows sophistication
Mathematics is precise and demonstrates sophistication
Sophisticated and rigorous mathematics at course level
